synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-19595 Oracle Linux 9 rust-afterburn bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19595
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19595

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19595.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
afterburn-5.9.0-1.el9_6.x86_64.rpm
afterburn-dracut-5.9.0-1.el9_6.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
afterburn-5.9.0-1.el9_6.aarch64.rpm
afterburn-dracut-5.9.0-1.el9_6.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/rust-afterburn-5.9.0-1.el9_6.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[5.9.0-1]
- New release
